DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCES. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF CHERISH M. SMITH'S MOTION TO QUASH DEFENDANTS DEPOSITION SUBPOENAS FOR PRODUCTION OF BUSINESS RECORDS TO NATIONWIDE LEGAL SERVICES IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MARCH 18, 2013 TO GIVE DEFENDANT THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. DEFENDANT MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS ORIGINAL OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MARCH 1, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING, REPLY, AND SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION PAPERS BUT DOES NOT HAVE ANY OF THE ORIGINAL OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE PRO TEM NILS ROSENQUEST, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion Adnmotion To Quash Defts Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records To Nationwide Legal Services
Off Calendar Mar-01-2013 Continued To Mar-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF CHERISH M. SMITH's motion To Quash Defendants Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records To Nationwide Legal Services IS Continued on the court's own motion to March 18, 2013 to give Defendant the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Defendant must deliver courtesy copies of its original opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 1, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. The court has courtesy copies of the moving, reply, and supplemental opposition papers but does not have any of the original opposition papers. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT NOR-CAL BEVERAGE CO., INC'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF CHERISH SMITH'S COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Bevin E. Allen of Khorrami, LLP (213.596.6000) for plaintiff and responding party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Overruled in its entirety. The challenged claims are adequately pled. Plaintiff alleges actionable misrepresentations, not mere puffery. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT NOR-CAL BEVERAGE CO., INC'S MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S CLASS ACTION COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Bevin E. Allen of Khorrami, LLP (213.596.6000) for plaintiff and responding party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Denied. While unusual, the attachment to a complaint of a statement from a purported expert bearing on an element of a claim pled in the complaint is not subject to being stricken per Code of Civil Procedure section 436. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
